mapper.update: UPDATE lesson SET lesson_hits = lesson_hits + 1 WHERE lesson_no = #{lesson_no}
mapper.insert:
SELECT lesson_seq.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO lesson(lesson_no, lesson_title, lesson_content,lesson_category, lesson_hits, lesson_reply_cnt, imageFileName, user_name, user_id ) VALUES(#{lesson_no}, #{lesson_title}, #{lesson_content}, #{lesson_category}, 0, 0, #{imageFileName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{user_name}, #{user_id})
